# GitHub Review Notes

This folder is not the primary home for workspace review reports.

For this repository, durable review reports belong under `docs/reviews/`, where they can follow the
current topic-based four-layer model:

1. `src/NN-category/topic-name/01-notes/`
2. `src/NN-category/topic-name/02-exercises/`
3. `src/NN-category/topic-name/03-implementations/`
4. `src/NN-category/topic-name/04-discussions/`

Use this folder only for GitHub-specific review metadata if it becomes necessary later.
